name: sumathi-rangayah
description: Public story-reading website for writer Sumathi Rangayah (bilingual Tamil/English).
comment_sanity: OPTIONAL (Phase 1 CMS): to enable the embedded admin studio + live publishing, run: npm i next-sanity@9 sanity@3 @sanity/vision@3 @sanity/image-url@1 styled-components@6  — then set the SANITY_* env vars. The site runs fully on seed data without these.
